'''pashadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osculant|osculant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osculant|osculant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pashadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæshædhæth|pæshædhæth]] || [[word:pæshædhæj|pæshædhæj]] || [[word:pæshædhæsh|pæshædhæsh]] || [[word:pæshædhæ|pæshædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pashashadhath|pashashadhath]] || [[word:pashashadhaj|pashashadhaj]] || [[word:pashashadhash|pashashadhash]] || [[word:pashashadha|pashashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pashadhath|pashadhath]] || [[word:pashadhaj|pashadhaj]] || [[word:pashadhash|pashadhash]] || [[word:pashadha|pashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pashafdhath|pashafdhath]] || [[word:pashafdhaj|pashafdhaj]] || [[word:pashafdhash|pashafdhash]] || [[word:pashafdhaf|pashafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pashadhatha|pashadhatha]] || [[word:pashadhaja|pashadhaja]] || [[word:pashadhasha|pashadhasha]] || [[word:pashadhaka|pashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pashadhath|pashadhath]] || [[word:pashadhaj|pashadhaj]] || [[word:pashadhash|pashadhash]] || [[word:pashadha|pashadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pashadhathal|pashadhathal]] || [[word:pashadhajal|pashadhajal]] || [[word:pashadhashal|pashadhashal]] || [[word:pashadhakal|pashadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pashadhathatha|pashadhathatha]] || [[word:pashadhajaja|pashadhajaja]] || [[word:pashadhashasha|pashadhashasha]] || [[word:pashadhaka|pashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pashadhathan|pashadhathan]] || [[word:pashadhajan|pashadhajan]] || [[word:pashadhashan|pashadhashan]] || [[word:pashadhakan|pashadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pashadhathaoro|pashadhathaoro]] || [[word:pashadhajaoro|pashadhajaoro]] || [[word:pashadhashaoro|pashadhashaoro]] || [[word:pashadhakaoro|pashadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
